summary: Employee Self-Service Portal Phase 1 testing completed. All 20 backend API tests passed (Task Categories CRUD, Enhanced Tasks CRUD, Task Workflow, Subtasks, Comments, Time Logs, Dashboard). Frontend pages working correctly: My Dashboard (shows employee profile not found for admin), My Tasks (Kanban board with filters), Task Categories (CRUD operations). Fixed header title issue for My Portal pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Employee Portal APIs follow proper role-based access control (manager/admin for categories, employees for own tasks)
Task workflow correctly enforces status transitions: assigned → in_progress → completed → verified
Dashboard returns appropriate response when user has no linked employee profile
Subtasks, comments, and time logs are properly embedded within task documents
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and clean up TEST_ prefixed categories and tasks during test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Portal Phase 1 complete. Test data includes: Department (Production Team), Employee (Jane Smith - EMP-001), Task Category (Production), and several tasks in various statuses. The admin test user has no employee profile linked, so My Dashboard shows 'Employee Profile Not Found' message which is expected behavior.

Enhanced Tasks API.GET /api/portal/tasks: PASS - Returns tasks with enriched data
Enhanced Tasks API.GET /api/portal/tasks with filters: PASS - Status and priority filters work

Task Workflow.POST /api/portal/tasks/{id}/reject: PASS - Manager rejects task back to in_progress

Comments API.POST /api/portal/tasks/{id}/comments: PASS - Adds comment with user name

Frontend.My Dashboard page: PASS - Shows employee profile not found for admin
Frontend.My Tasks page: PASS - Kanban board with status/priority filters

bug_fix_applied.issue: Header title showed 'Dashboard' instead of page name for My Portal pages
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added employeePortalItems to the header title lookup array
